source_pr.title: *: add table storage info status api
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/4989

Problem Summary:
Add table storage infomation to status api.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/4989

What's Changed:
new status api: http://127.0.0.1:10080/schema_storage

How it Works:
By querying INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- add table storage info status api
